result.result:
## Shipped this week on agent-office (2026-04-13 → 04-18)

**Phase 1–3 foundations (Apr 13, bd59458 → ca066d7)** — Foundation, Agent Core (personas/skills/resolver/launcher), Memory Engine (domain-scoped queries, injector, importer).

**Phase 4 Office UI (Apr 13–14)** — React frontend with animated office scene (eaebe7c), swapped placeholder squares for pixel-art sprites (69510ec). Extracted pixel-agents into a standalone engine across 54fcd13…fd62f21 (constants/types, sprites, floors/walls, layout modules, core engine, browser asset loader). Wired OfficeCanvas + 3-column dashboard (c8c8f57, 68467b0, 6ac04c0); default 25×20 layout with 7 themed zones (a4ef81e); fixes for click→world transform, zone pinning, label rendering.

**Launcher + preview (Apr 14)** — iTerm2 tab spawn (64ed75e), `GET /api/office/preview` + full `launch()` on POST (acdddfa), LaunchPreview component with last session + persona memories + skills (27cb1d3), ProjectPicker opens preview instead of launching directly (c0f0d86). Hardened with terminal detection, prompt-to-file, `execFile` (af527f8).

**Claude-mem integration (Apr 14)** — read-only SQLite adapter (d109f26), heuristic persona filter (e079b4f), boot-time connection (3842a50), context injection into launcher (1c875a4). Merged as Phase 4.5/4.6 in 6b61356.

**Phase 5 Telemetry (Apr 15)** — provider adapters, office state, portfolio stats (4d9806d); redesigned picker with provider-aware preview (42aab52); local skill roots + launch inventory (a4cb528); merged 3199451.

**Provider-neutral history (Apr 16)** — ingestion (9c4afb4), Codex history summary enrichment (fc03de3), idle-grace live sessions (aaa47ed, a8f6bd4), doctor command (3b9f1a9), local port resolution from config (ef1cec2).

**Persona-scoped memory brief + unified memory (Apr 18)** — brief generator (4d9a58a), bench harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings (40c5014), wired brief into live launch (17bf243) and LaunchPreview (ec56fb9). Unified memory stats + semantic search exposed, claude-mem fallback dropped (2dbef00); surfaced in project picker (3c1cf94). Floor simplified to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer persona (d5da889). LaunchWizard consolidated to a single 4-step modal (3b6c0b4). README rewritten around unified-memory USP + brief benchmarks (18e1cbb).

**Marketing/tooling** — Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture (01f2a70); dep adds: sqlite-vec, @huggingface/transformers, playwright (0c3dfbd).

## Uncertain / not verified
- **Bench results**: `bench/` dir and `scripts/bench-{aggregate,judge,whitepaper}.mjs` are **untracked** (per git status at session start). The whitepaper/blog drafts (S288/S289 in memory) cite these numbers but the artifacts aren't committed — so I can't confirm the specific savings figures from git alone.
- **Deployment/release**: I didn't verify whether any of this was tagged or published — only that it's on `main`.
- Memory context also references lens-dev-5574c work (Stripe tiers, brand management, quota system) — that's a **different repo**, not agent-office, and I excluded it from this summary.
